headline: Emerson Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: Emerson (NYSE: EMR) will report its second quarter results after market close on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. Emerson senior management will discuss the results during an investor conference call that same day, beginning at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time, 3:30 p.m. Central Time.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Eaton, Emerson Electric, Powell Industries and EnerSys
summary: Eaton gains from AI data center demand as select electronics manufacturers outperform despite rising costs, supply-chain issues, and weak industry outlook.
